title: bothriocline centauroides
intro: Bothriocline centauroides, commonly known as the Blue Plectranthus, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of anxiety and stress. The health benefits of Bothriocline centauroides are attributed to its therapeutic actions, which include antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The bioactive constituents of this plant include essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.

side_effects: Bothriocline centauroides can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds.
